attacks.title: New msaRAT malware uses Chrome, Edge browsers to route C2 traffic
attacks.desc: The Chaos ransomware gang is using a new backdoor dubbed msaRAT that hides command-and-control (C2) communication by routing it through the Chrome or Edge browsers. [...]

attacks.title: Check Point warns of SmartConsole zero-day exploited in attacks

attacks.title: Upbound says hack caused $13 million in fraudulent Acima leases
attacks.desc: The Upbound Group fintech company disclosed that threat actors who stole data from its systems leveraged it to create $13 million in Acima leases. [...]

attacks.title: Swiss rail giant Stadler rejects $12.3M ransom demand after cyberattack
attacks.desc: Swiss rail vehicle manufacturer Stadler Rail says the Everest ransomware gang demanded about $12.3 million after breaching a data exchange platform shared with one of its suppliers. [...]

attacks.title: How enterprise GenAI can amplify ransomware risk — and how to contain it

attacks.title: Hackers Exploit Windmill Flaw to Read Arbitrary Server Files Without Authentication

attacks.title: CISA orders urgent action on actively exploited Langflow RCE flaw
attacks.desc: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday ordered U.S. government agencies to prioritize patching an actively exploited vulnerability in the Langflow visual framework for building AI agents. …

attacks.title: Chick-fil-A discloses data breach after credential stuffing attacks
attacks.desc: American fast food restaurant chain Chick-fil-A is notifying customers of a data breach after their accounts were hacked in a wave of recent credential stuffing attacks. [...]

attacks.title: OpenAI says its AI models hacked Hugging Face during testing
